features.title: SmartFlip Proposal — Deal Sources + Affiliate + Costs Update
features.description: Update proposal and demo to reflect expanded deal sources, Canada affiliate situation, and corrected running costs per Justin's March 21 feedback

acceptance_criteria.description: Deal Finder sources updated: eBay + Facebook + Walmart clearance API + SlickDeals RSS + DealNews RSS
Keepa API added for Amazon price history and deal validation
Deal finder explains buy-side vs sell-side: buy from FB/Walmart clearance, sell on eBay/Amazon
Used items sources: Facebook, Smart Scan (thrift/yard sales), eBay underpriced
New items sources: Walmart clearance/rollback, SlickDeals, DealNews (500+ stores)
Affiliate system described as pluggable module (not hardcoded to one provider)
Amazon Associates Canada noted as primary affiliate source (available, Justin has account)
eBay Partner Network noted as restricted for Canada, added later with US entity
Walmart affiliate noted as US only
Rakuten and CJ Affiliate noted as Canadian-friendly alternatives
Running costs updated from $40-60/mo to $75-95/mo (Keepa EUR 49/mo added)
Tech stack updated: add Walmart API, Keepa API, SlickDeals RSS, DealNews RSS
User profile section listed in deliverables (name, email, phone, address, affiliate link, payout)
Sales landing page ($200) noted as separate deliverable
